title: AI Consultant Site Content
description: Single source of truth for site content. Edit this file to update your site.

title.description: Your professional title shown in hero and metadata

tagline.description: Short value proposition for your consulting practice
tagline.example: Helping businesses navigate the AI transition

email.description: Public contact email used in the Contact section

linkedin.description: LinkedIn profile URL for footer and contact links

headline.description: Primary headline displayed at top of the site

subheadline.example: Strategic guidance for teams adopting AI tools, workflows, and culture.

cta_href.description: Target anchor or URL for the hero call-to-action

services.description: List of service cards rendered in the Services section

id.description: Stable identifier for the service entry

title.description: Service name shown in card heading

description.description: Short explanation of the service offering
description.example: Hands-on workshops for teams at every level — from executives to engineers.

icon.description: Emoji or short icon text displayed in each service card

bio.example: 10+ years in enterprise technology. I help organizations move from AI curiosity to AI capability.

contact.description: Contact section prompt and form endpoint

prompt.description: Short invitation text in the Contact section
prompt.example: Ready to start your AI journey?

form_action.description: Formspree endpoint URL used by the contact form
